Welcome - Glazer Kennedy JV


Hi ,

Jeff Walker here... I am helping Glazer-Kennedy with
their upcoming launch.

Thanks for your recent application to be a JV Partner.
We had a few hiccups in our system, and we didn't get a
proper "thank you" email out to you.

I just wanted to let you know that you are in our
system, and you have been approved for a JV account.

We are putting the finishing touches on our back end
system... and we will be ready to go in a few days. The
launch is going to be October 18th, and we will be
going into pre-launch in the next week.

Once we go into pre-launch, we will have some solid
content for you to maild to your list. And, of course,
everyone you send to that content will be cookied so
that you get credited for those visits when we actually
get to launch day.

That's it for now... I just wanted to check in with you
to let you know we haven't forgotten aobut you. Look
for more details soon.


best regards,
Jeff
